parameters.content:
## Review notification → email (F73.1 kb:n8n-review-notifications)

Reckons.AI POSTs here whenever new facts land for review — a grant scrape, a subscribed publisher's pod, or any ingest — so you get an email instead of having to open the graph.

**Setup:**
1. Import this workflow, open the Webhook node, copy the **production** URL. Its path must be `reckons-review` so it matches `POST {n8nBaseUrl}/webhook/reckons-review`.
2. In Reckons.AI → Settings → Integrations: set the n8n base URL and enable **Notify on review** (`n8nNotifyOnReview`).
3. Set the Send Email credential + your address.

Payload: `{ count, kind, source?, samples?[], at }`.

nodes.name: Send email
nodes.notes: Set your SMTP credential + recipient. Swap for the Gmail/Slack/etc. node to change the channel — the app doesn't care how you're notified.
